findings.description: Several PascalCase class names that appear in code examples within s1 are absent from the hints array: HttpResponse, HttpRequest, ExecutionContext (all appear in the confirmメソッド signatures), and Client, Industry (entity classes used in BeanUtil.createAndCopy and UniversalDao.findAll calls).
findings.source_evidence: Source code: `public HttpResponse confirm(HttpRequest request, ExecutionContext context)`, `Client client = BeanUtil.createAndCopy(Client.class, form)`, `EntityList<Industry> industries = UniversalDao.findAll(Industry.class)`
